samples.gvd:
module div_8bit
(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input sign,
    input [7:0] dividend,
    input [7:0] divisor,
    input opn_valid,
    input res_ready,
    output res_valid,
    output [15:0] result
);
endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_16bit">
    <description>Design an 8-bit divider using a combination of sequential and combinational logic.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst">Reset signal.</input>
        <input id="sign">1-bit flag indicating whether the operation is signed (1) or unsigned (0).</input>
        <input id="dividend" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input for the dividend.</input>
        <input id="divisor" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input for the divisor.</input>
        <input id="opn_valid">Valid operation signal.</input>
        <input id="res_ready">Result ready signal.</input>
        <output id="res_valid">Result valid output.</output>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output for the result.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="IDLE">0</parameter>
        <parameter id="SUB">1</parameter>
        <parameter id="S1">2</parameter>
        <parameter id="S2">3</parameter>
        <parameter id="S3">4</parameter>
        <parameter id="S4">5</parameter>
        <parameter id="S5">6</parameter>
        <parameter id="S6">7</parameter>
        <parameter id="S7">8</parameter>
        <parameter id="S8">9</parameter>
        <parameter id="S9">10</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic>
            <description>Reset logic for multiple registers.</description>
            <reg id="cnt" width_description="[4:0]">Counter for division steps.</reg>
            <reg id="start_cnt">Start flag for the counter.</reg>
            <reg id="neg_divisor" width_description="[15:0]">Negative divisor for subtraction.</reg>
            <reg id="sr" width_description="[15:0]">Shift register for storing remainder and quotient.</reg>
            <reg id="res_valid">Result valid flag.</reg>
            <reg id="msb">Most significant bit of the shift register.</reg>
            <reg id="rem_temp" width_description="[15:0]">Temporary remainder.</reg>
            <if condition="rst">
                <description>Reset all registers and flags.</description>
                <assignment node_id="cnt" value="0"/> 
                <assignment node_id="start_cnt" value="0"/> 
                <assignment node_id="neg_divisor" value="0"/> 
                <assignment node_id="sr" value="0"/> 
                <assignment node_id="res_valid" value="0"/> 
                <assignment node_id="msb" value="0"/> 
                <assignment node_id="rem_temp" value="0"/> 
            </if>
            <if condition="opn_valid && !res_valid">
                <description>Initialize shift register and other registers when a new operation is valid.</description>
                <assignment node_id="cnt" value="1"/> 
                <assignment node_id="start_cnt" value="1"/> 
                <assignment node_id="neg_divisor" value="0"/> 
                <assignment node_id="sr" value="dividend << 1"/> 
                <assignment node_id="res_valid" value="0"/> 
                <assignment node_id="msb" value="0"/> 
                <assignment node_id="rem_temp" value="0"/> 
            </if>
            <if condition="start_cnt">
                <description>Start division process.</description>
                <if condition="cnt == 8">
                    <description>Division process is complete.</description>
                    <assignment node_id="cnt" expression="cnt & 8"/> 
                    <assignment node_id="start_cnt" value="0"/> 
                    <assignment node_id="sr" value="res_temp"/> 
                    <assignment node_id="res_valid" value="1"/> 
                </if>
                <else>
                    <description>Division process continues.</description>
                    <assignment node_id="neg_divisor" value="neg_divisor"/> 
                    <sub id="sub1">
                        <description>Subtract divisor from shift register.</description>
                        <input node_id="neg_divisor" value="neg_divisor - sr[15:8]"/> 
                        <output node_id="msb"/> 
                    </sub>
                    <mux id="mux1">
                        <description>Select new shift register value based on subtraction result.</description>
                        <input node_id="msb" value="msb ? neg_divisor : sr[15:8]"/> 
                        <output node_id="sr"/> 
                    </mux>
                    <assignment node_id="sr" value="sr << 1"/> 
                    <assignment node_id="sr[0]" value="msb"/> 
                    <assignment node_id="res_temp" value="msb ? sr + divisor : sr"/> 
                    <assignment node_id="cnt" expression="cnt + 1"/> 
                </if>
            </if>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <task>
        <description>Implement the division operation.</description>
        <if condition="rst">
            <description>Reset all registers and flags.</description>
            <assignment node_id="cnt" value="0"/> 
            <assignment node_id="start_cnt" value="0"/> 
            <assignment node_id="neg_divisor" value="0"/> 
            <assignment node_id="sr" value="0"/> 
            <assignment node_id="res_valid" value="0"/> 
            <assignment node_id="msb" value="0"/> 
            <assignment node_id="rem_temp" value="0"/> 
        </if>
        <if condition="opn_valid && !res_valid">
            <description>Initialize shift register and other registers when a new operation is valid.</description>
            <assignment node_id="cnt" value="1"/> 
            <assignment node_id="start_cnt" value="1"/> 
            <assignment node_id="neg_divisor" value="0"/> 
            <assignment node_id="sr" value="dividend << 1"/> 
            <assignment node_id="res_valid" value="0"/> 
            <assignment node_id="msb" value="0"/> 
            <assignment node_id="rem_temp" value="0"/> 
        </if>
        <if condition="start_cnt">
            <description>Start division process.</description>
            <if condition="cnt == 8">
                <description>Division process is complete.</description>
                <assignment node_id="cnt" value="cnt & 8"/> 
                <assignment node_id="start_cnt" value="0"/> 
                <assignment node_id="sr" value="res_temp"/> 
                <assignment node_id="res_valid" value="1"/> 
            </if>
            <else>
                <description>Division process continues.</description>
                <assignment node_id="neg_divisor" value="neg_divisor"/> 
                <sub id="sub1">
                    <description>Subtract divisor from shift register.</description>
                    <input node_id="neg_divisor" value="neg_divisor - sr[15:8]"/> 
                    <output node_id="msb"/> 
                </sub>
                <mux id="mux1">
                    <description>Select new shift register value based on subtraction result.</description>
                    <input node_id="msb" value="msb ? neg_divisor : sr[15:8]"/> 
                    <output node_id="sr"/> 
                </mux>
                <assignment node_id="sr" value="sr << 1"/> 
                <assignment node_id="sr[0]" value="msb"/> 
                <assignment node_id="res_temp" value="msb ? sr + divisor : sr"/> 
                <assignment node_id="cnt" expression="cnt + 1"/> 
            </else>
        </if>
    </task>
    <implementation>
    The module performs division of two 8-bit numbers (dividend and divisor) using a combination of sequential and combinational logic. 
    When a valid operation request is received, the module initializes the necessary registers and starts the division process. 
    The division is performed by shifting the remainder and updating it based on the subtraction of the divisor. 
    The result is valid when the counter reaches 8, and the division process is complete.
    </implementation>
</module>
